name: Noodles W/Poppy Seed and Raisins
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Poppy seed cake and pastry-filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water and salt in a large saucepan.
Add noodles and cook until tender, then drain and cool.
2. Toss noodles with butter in the saucepan.
3. Combine poppy-seed filling with vanilla extract, lemon juice, and lemon peel, and raisins. Add to noodles and mix well. Cook just until heated through.
